400 RUSS - Russian

RELS347 Tradition and Change: Jewish Religion in the Modern World (3 Credits)

An exploration of the history of the different modern Jewish religious movements that developed in Europe, starting with messianic movements and ending with Reform and Orthodoxy. Emphasis will

be placed on the influence of the academic study of Judaism on the development of modern Jewish religious ideologies and practices. Cross-listed with: JWST347, HIST429X.
